  • Classes in io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core used by io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core
    Class
    Description
    Alert
    Defines the contract for an alert that can be rendered and updated within a GUI context.
    Component
    Represents a base GUI component within the GUI framework.
    GUI
    Represents a base GUI within the GUI framework.
    MouseButton
    Represents mouse buttons.
    Overlay
    Defines the contract for an overlay that can be rendered and updated within a GUI context.
    Widget
    Represents a displayable widget that contains a Component object.
    Widget.Anchor
    Represents anchor points on a widget.
